headline: US Inflation PUMPS 💦📈 to 3.3% GAS ORGY 😩⛽💥
text:
US INFLATION 🚀💸 just MOONED 🍑📈 to 3.3% – HIGHEST in NEARLY 2 YRS 😱🔥 cuz IRAN WAR 💣🇮🇷 + US-ISRAEL BEEF 🥊 shut down STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚫🌊, sending OIL PRICES 🚀🛢️ to ORBIT 🌌! Pump prices at the GAS STATION ⛽😩 SURGED 21.2% MoM – BIGGEST JUMP since 1967 📈🤯, fuel oil SLAYED 30%+ like a Y2K hangover 💥🍾! Cali simps 😭🌴 paying $5.93/gal vs natty $4.16 💸🤑, Annel Villegas 23yo truck mama 🚚👩‍🍼 DROPPING F-BOMBS 💣: 'TERRIBLE AF 😤, $70-80 every HALF TANK 🛢️💦 – gotta DRIVE to SURVIVE 🛣️😩!' 

GAS SPIKE alone = 3/4ths of Feb-Mar INFLATION BLOWUP 📊🔥💨, airlines 🎫✈️ & threads 👕🧵 jacked too from ENERGY HYPE + TARIFTS 🛡️ passing that PAIN 😩 to ur wallet 💳🍑! Food flatline 🥐📉 for now but analysts TEA-SIPPING ☕: TRANSPORT + FERTILIZER COSTS ⛽🌱 gonna HIT ur McD's soon 🍔💥! Hormuz = OIL 🛢️ + NGAS 🔥 + ALUMINUM 🥫 + HELIUM 🎈 highway – US-Iran TALKS 🗣️🤝 got peeps HOPIUM 💨🥴 for RE-OPEN but SUPPLIES gonna LAG 🐌⏳, oil dipped from PEAKS 🏔️ but STILL THICC 📈🍆 over pre-war! 

Wall Street cucks 🤑📉 DREAMING Fed rate CUTS ✂️😍 DASHED 💥🚫 – Berenberg econ bro Atakan Bakiskan SPILLING: 'TRANSITORY? 😂 Fed got PTSD from PANDEMIC MISJUDGE 🤡📉 – no more 'TEMPORARY' LARPING 🧢!' Echoes 2022 RUSSIA-UKRAINE ENERGY SHOCK ⚡🇷🇺🇺🇦 – now IRAN STRAITS DRAMA 🛤️😤 got JEROME POWELL 🤖💼 sweating BULLETS 🧨, rates STAYING HIGH 🆙📈 like Cali gas! Kayla Epstein reporting the HEAT 🔥📰 – INFLATION'S BACK, B*TCHES, FILL 'ER UP ⛽💦😩!
